summary: Iteration 78 - Resolution-Based Pricing & Role Permissions verified. Fixed AttributeError bug in photographer.py go_live endpoint. All 6/6 pytest tests PASSED.

bugs_fixed.fix: Changed photographer.gallery_photo_price to photographer.photo_price_standard (correct attribute name)
bugs_fixed.impact: Go-live endpoint was returning 500 Internal Server Error

gallery_pricing_returns_photo_pricing_ti.details: GET /api/photographer/{id}/gallery-pricing returns photo_pricing with web, standard, high fields

go_live_accepts_resolution_pricing.details: POST /api/photographer/{id}/go-live accepts photo_price_web, photo_price_standard, photo_price_high parameters

go_live_returns_resolution_pricing.details: Go-live response includes live_session_rates.resolution_pricing with web, standard, high prices

grom_parent_blocked_from_go_live.details: POST /api/photographer/{grom_parent_id}/go-live returns 403 Forbidden for Grom Parent role
grom_parent_blocked_from_go_live.error_message: Grom Parents cannot start Live Sessions. Gallery and Bookings access only.

surf_spots_go_live_accepts_resolution_pr.details: POST /api/photographers/{id}/go-live (surf_spots route) also accepts and returns resolution pricing

hobbyist_can_go_live_when_no_pro_nearby.details: Hobbyist role can go live successfully when no Photographer/Approved Pro is within 0.1 miles

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug at /app/backend/routes/photographer.py line 820 - was referencing non-existent 'gallery_photo_price' attribute
Both go-live endpoints (photographer.py and surf_spots.py) correctly accept and return resolution pricing
Role-based permissions working: Grom Parent blocked with 403, Hobbyist proximity check in place
LiveSession model has session_price_web, session_price_standard, session_price_high columns (models.py lines 1208-1210)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend features verified PASS after fixing AttributeError bug. The go-live endpoint now correctly uses photo_price_standard instead of non-existent gallery_photo_price. Resolution-based pricing (web, standard, high) working in both photographer.py and surf_spots.py go-live routes. Role restrictions (Grom Parent 403, Hobbyist proximity check) verified.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Code in photographer.py line 820 referenced 'photographer.gallery_photo_price' but Profile model uses 'photo_price_standard' for this purpose
